How it works1 · Primary2 · Secondary3 · University4 · IndustryAbout

Palestra AI · Platform prototype

One methodology.
Four levels of delivery.

Palestra AI is an educational architecture for human–AI co-formation — generative AI as a medium for human formation, not a substitute for it. This platform is the technical connector that carries that single methodology across four educational levels, from primary school to industry.

How it works See Level 1 in detail

Phase I pilot, AY 2025/26

~400

primary pupils, IC Bianca

~150

Liceo Majorana co-educators

61%

recalled "success isn't only winning" — top POST score

1 in 3

pupils said "AI can get it wrong" — unprompted

Source: POST evaluation, 19 May 2026 — see About & Provenance.

The architecture

Four levels, one logic

The same methodology — the Teenager Circle, the Talento · Valore · Successo arc, Human-in-the-Loop by design — is adapted to four audiences. Level 1 and 2 are already running in the field. Levels 3 and 4 are roadmap, built on the same logic.

1 Real content from Phase I

Primary School

Maestre + bambini (8–11)

The Four Stations — real content from the IC Bianca pilot, AY 2025/26.

Explore →
2 Interactive mockup

Secondary School

Liceali (15–18) + tutor esterno

The Teenager Circle training protocol — interactive module preview, 3A · 4E · 5A.

Explore →
3 Roadmap — AY 2027/28

University & Executive Ed

Università + business schools

Modules adapted for adult learners — leadership, innovation, human–AI collaboration.

Explore →
4 Roadmap — conversations in progress

Industry

Industry partners

Talent pipeline interface for the tech/telco ecosystem already in dialogue with the project.

Explore →

Why it works

A dual-beneficiary model

Secondary-school students aren't assistants — they are the primary educators of the AI-literacy moments for younger pupils. Teaching consolidates their own learning, and primary pupils learn AI literacy from near-peers rather than distant adults.

  • Primary pupils beneficiaries of AI literacy, in the strict sense.
  • Liceo students beneficiaries of a transformative PCTO experience — from AI users to "AI ambassadors".
Read the full methodology

The Four Stations

  1. 1 · Talento — talent & self-discovery
  2. 2 · Valore — from talent to contribution
  3. 3 · Successo — redefining success
  4. 4 · Comic-Strip Review — Human-in-the-Loop with real AI outputs
See station details →

Jointly developed with the Palestra AI school network

IC Bianca, IC Capuana-De Amicis and Liceo Majorana (Avola, Sicily) — and now in research collaboration with INSEAD for Phase II, AY 2026/27.
